start.welcome:
Hi @{username}! Welcome to DevPinger.

Connect a service to start receiving notifications:
start.welcomeFallback:
Hi! Welcome to DevPinger.

Connect a service to start receiving notifications:
start.connectedGithub: ✅ GitHub connected as @{login}. Send /repos to pick what to watch.
start.connectedJira: ✅ Jira connected as {login}. Issues, comments, and status changes will show up here.

menu.connectedHint: {provider} is already connected. To disconnect, revoke DevPinger's access in your {provider} account settings (Applications / OAuth apps).

notifications.title: 🔔 Notifications What lands in your personal chat.
notifications.selfActionsHint: When OFF, the bot doesn't send you events that you triggered yourself (your own PR opened/closed/merged, your own comments).

help.text:
DevPinger aggregates notifications from GitHub and Jira into Telegram.

Commands:
/start — connect services
/repos — pick GitHub repositories to watch
/projects — pick Jira projects to watch
/mutes — list and manage your mute rules
/recent — last 20 events
/stats — your activity summary
/lang — switch language

sources.github: GitHub — issues, PRs, reviews, comments, releases. Connect via /start.
sources.jira: Jira Cloud — issues, comments, status transitions, mentions. Connect via /start.

eventDeepLink.notFound: This event is no longer available — it may have been cleaned up or it never belonged to you.

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.unauthorized: You need to connect this service first via /start.
errors.notSupported: This action is not supported for this event yet.
errors.alreadyClosed: This PR is already closed or merged.
errors.cantApproveOwnPr: GitHub doesn't let you approve your own pull request.
errors.notFound: This PR or issue is no longer reachable (deleted or closed).
errors.forbidden: You do not have permission for this action on the provider side.
errors.providerRateLimit: The provider is rate-limiting us right now — try again in a moment.
errors.reconnect: Your {provider} connection expired or was revoked. Reconnect via /start.

actionResult.commentPrompt: Reply to this message with your comment text. Send /cancel to abort.
actionResult.commentExpired: Comment session expired — tap the button again.

mutes.empty: You don't have any mute rules yet. Tap 🔕 Mute on any event to add one.
mutes.alreadyExists: That mute rule is already in your list.

history.recentEmpty: Nothing in your history yet — events will show up here once they come in.
history.statsEmpty: No data yet — once events arrive, /stats will show your totals.

repos.prompt: Pick the repositories you want DevPinger to watch:
repos.loadError: Failed to load repositories — try again later.
repos.setupFailed: Could not set up the webhook on {fullName}. Make sure you have admin access.

jiraProjects.prompt: Pick the Jira projects you want DevPinger to watch:
jiraProjects.loadError: Failed to load Jira projects — try again later.
